name: Maple Brickle Nut Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour two 8-inch or 9-inch round cake pans.
2. In a large bowl, blend all cake ingredients except nuts until moistened. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed; fold in nuts.
3. Pour batter into prepared pans.
4. Bake 9-inch layers for 30-40 minutes; 8-inch layers for 35-45 minutes at 325°F.
5. Cool 15 minutes in pans, then loosen sides and remove from pans. Cool completely.
6. In a small bowl, dissolve drink mix and instant coffee in hot water. Add powdered sugar, Bit's of Brickle, and margarine; beat until fluffy.
7. Slice cooled cake into 4 layers. Gently spread 1/3 filling between each layer.
8. For frosting: In a small bowl, combine Cool Whip and powdered sugar.
9. Frost top and sides of cake. Garnish with whole or halves walnuts.
10. Refrigerate cake for at least 2 hours.
